# YOLKO

> Fresh Pace Farm eggs at Paddy's Markets Flemington (Sydney Markets). Book online, pick up Friday or Saturday.

- Site: https://getyolko.com/
- Location: Building D, Sydney Markets, 250 Parramatta Road, Flemington NSW 2129, Australia
- Product: Pace Farm egg trays (30 eggs), multi-tray packs, and full boxes for cafés
- Booking: https://getyolko.com/#order
- Pickup days: Friday and Saturday (hours shown on the site)
- Contact: WhatsApp +61 433 975 055 (https://wa.me/61433975055)
- Privacy: https://getyolko.com/privacy
- Terms: https://getyolko.com/terms
